steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states she continuously worked to promote health, and describes an effort involving traveling and writing a dictionary. The word continuously is the decisive signal — it shows her effort was ongoing and sustained.

steps.title: Match the answer to the signal
steps.content: Persistent means continuing steadily or lasting over time — which directly expresses continuously. The other three choices describe different qualities: impartial (neutrality), offhand (casual), and mandatory (obligation) don't capture sustained effort. That matches choice C — C is correct.
